Template Use Case/Title: Supplier Shipping and Fulfillment Policy Education
Applicable SOPs: Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) Supplier Self Service Updates
Text: Hi [Supplier Team] I’m happy to review more information on our updated shipping and fulfillment policy. Beginning December 15th, 2025 a new compliance policy went into effect regarding shipping orders from the assigned warehouse the Wayfair system designates. Orders are routed based on inventory availability at the time the order is placed. To help support maintaining your success while minimizing financial impacts, please keep in mind the following: To ensure orders are routed to the correct warehouse: Keep warehouse hours, holidays, and contact info updated in Partner Home. Report accurate inventory at all warehouses. Warehouse assignments are based on supplier’s reported inventory and the customer’s delivery address. Regularly audit warehouse inventory accuracy and fulfillment reliability. Suppliers will face credit deductions for ship costs incurred when shipping from a warehouse other than the one assigned by Wayfair (including international shipments) that results in higher costs. If the risk of these deductions is not acceptable, please be aware the following options we are able to support at this time: Submit an order delay for the PO until you are able to ship it from the system-assigned warehouse. You can read more information about submitting an order delay here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 Select a new warehouse that has inventory available to fulfill this order; please note, this option will result in the aforementioned credit deductions. Please see the following help center resource for more information and the complete updated policy: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3348 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership.

Template Use Case/Title: Assigned Warehouse Policy - No Dropship Reroute
Applicable SOPs: PO Reroutes SOP (DSC2S) PO Reroutes SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hi [Supplier Team], I’m happy to review more information on our updated shipping and fulfillment policy. Beginning December 15th, 2025 a new compliance policy went into effect regarding shipping orders from the assigned warehouse the Wayfair system designates. Orders are routed based on inventory availability at the time the order is placed. To align with this policy, we are no longer able to reroute dropship POs to another dropship warehouse. To help support maintaining your success while minimizing financial impacts, please keep in mind the following: To ensure orders are routed to the correct warehouse: Keep warehouse hours, holidays, and contact info updated in Partner Home. Report accurate inventory at all warehouses. Warehouse assignments are based on supplier’s reported inventory and the customer’s delivery address. Regularly audit warehouse inventory accuracy and fulfillment reliability. Suppliers will face credit deductions for ship costs incurred when shipping from a warehouse other than the one assigned by Wayfair (including international shipments) that results in higher costs. If the risk of these deductions is not acceptable, please be aware the following options we are able to support at this time: Submit an order delay for the PO until you are able to ship it from the system-assigned warehouse. You can read more information about submitting an order delay here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 Select a new warehouse that has inventory available to fulfill this order by amending the Ship From warehouse in Order Management; please note, this option will result in the aforementioned credit deductions. Please see the following help center resource for more information and the complete updated policy: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3348 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Kind Regards,
